item.title: i'm glad you're here. let's just enjoy this moment before we go ahead.
item.description: SOURCE: https://x.com/soapdpzel
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nick cave everybody
must be a lot to take in
yo quiero taco bell
disgusting
cool fact
i guess
we've all been there
what kinda fish is on the left?
every single one
this was me a long time ago
you can call me ray, or you can call me jay..
impressive
as your lawyer i advise you to not do this
looks like face drugs
such a great action movie
alright that's weird
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The last time I posted about my dad in the hospital was in 2020 and I was effing traumatized. This time was 100% different thankfully.
item.description: People shit on how slow our health care system can be but when it’s a real, real, REAL emergency they get the job done. I am so incredibly thankful.
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: Help me, Imgur. Tiny octopus is trapped.
item.description: It's been an hour. Have to pee. Hungry. Everything is going dark... Is this how it ends? It's been a good life.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: DC villains are voiced by such charming people
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Body
item.description: You scroll past these comics to escape stress, but on the other side, creators are drowning in it. Platforms profit from our work, but we see none of it. Patreon is the difference between creating out of love and creating out of desperation. If you’ve ever laughed, smiled, or felt less alone because of our comics, know this: your support means the world. Thank you for being part of the story. PS: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: This is Gunnar Gran, CEO of Haltbakk Bunkers, one of Norway’s largest fuel companies. His company has announced that they will stop providing fuel to the U.S. until Trump supports Ukraine.
item.description: Be like Gunnar!

item.title: Instagram is actively protecting overtly racist comments
item.description: Yet they shadow-ban anyone who speaks about the ongoing Palestinian genocide. If nothing is done we'll see lynchings do a comeback in our lifetime. FUCK META, FUCK GOOGLE, FUCK X, FUCK MICROSOFT and all the lame tech bros who think they are above us!
